name: Erika Karisawa
description:
__Height:__ 160cm 

Erika is a very passionate otaku and manga reader. She and Walker are usually together. She is equally enthusiastic about manga or novel-inspired torture. It is noted she is a "fujoshi" or a yaoi fan.   Like Izaya, she calls Kadota "Dotachin".   

~!She is a member of the anonymous online gang Dollars. She was also a member of Kadota's gang.!~
